filesModified.purpose: Restructured popover wrapper: removed padding from outer div, added flex column layout with gap for spacing, wrapped ToggleControl+TextControls in inner div with side+bottom padding only so LinkControl keeps its own built-in padding

warnings: Pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in unrelated blocks

syncStatus.notes: TSX-only change — the Popover is editor-only with no PHP counterpart.

fixesApplied.change: Outer popover div: removed padding, added display:flex flexDirection:column gap:12px (kept minWidth:300px)
Wrapped ToggleControl + both TextControls in inner div with style={{ padding: '0 16px 16px' }} so they get side/bottom padding while LinkControl above keeps only its own built-in padding
